testcase.name: Accessibility › Page has a valid lang attribute
Accessibility › All images have alt text
Accessibility › Form inputs have associated labels
Accessibility › Page has a main landmark
Accessibility › Interactive elements are keyboard accessible
Product API › GET /api/products returns 200 and a list of products
Product API › GET /api/products/1 returns a valid product object
Product API › GET /api/products/999 returns 404
Product API › POST /api/products with valid body returns 201
Product API › POST /api/products with missing name returns 400 with validation errors
Product API › POST /api/products with negative price returns 400
Product API › GET /api/products/search?q=serum returns matching products
Product API › GET /api/products/search?q=nonexistent returns empty list
Product API › GET /api/products/health/detailed returns status UP with memory and uptime
Product API › API response time is under 500ms
Product UI › Home page loads and displays product table
Product UI › Product table contains seeded products
Product UI › Search filters products by name
Product UI › Search with no results shows empty state message
Product UI › Add Product form submits successfully and product appears in table
Product UI › Add Product form shows validation errors for empty fields
Product UI › Page title and header are correct
